# showsDoneButton

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that determines whether to display a Done button.

## Declaration

```swift
var showsDoneButton: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Use [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] to show a Done button; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Changing the Appearance

- **showsCancelButton**: A Boolean that determines whether to display a Cancel button.
